description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tops that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with jeans and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product DetailsTeal green sleeveless top, has a mandarin collar with a split U neckline, purple panel with pink and red tape detail around the neckline, gathers from below the panel, embroidery on the left side above the hem and tape detail at the hem Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
